name: reset
desc: Assert reset (rst_i=1), all external outputs zeroed

name: mem_i_accept
desc: Set mem_i_accept_i=1, verify instruction memory handshake acceptance

name: mem_i_valid
desc: Set mem_i_valid_i=1, verify instruction memory valid response

name: mem_i_error
desc: Set mem_i_error_i=1, verify error propagated through MMU

name: mem_d_accept
desc: Set mem_d_accept_i=1, verify data memory handshake acceptance

name: mem_d_ack
desc: Set mem_d_ack_i=1, verify data memory acknowledge

name: mem_d_error
desc: Set mem_d_error_i=1, verify data memory error propagation

name: interrupt
desc: Assert intr_i=1, verify interrupt taken by CSR

name: mem_i_rd_output
desc: Monitor mem_i_rd_o after MMU processes fetch request

name: mem_i_flush_output
desc: Monitor mem_i_flush_o after fetch flush request

name: mem_d_rd_output
desc: Monitor mem_d_rd_o after LSU processes load

name: mem_d_cacheable_output
desc: Monitor mem_d_cacheable_o for cacheable region detection

name: mem_d_flush_output
desc: Monitor mem_d_flush_o after LSU flush request

name: mem_d_writeback_output
desc: Monitor mem_d_writeback_o after LSU writeback request

name: mem_d_invalidate
desc: Monitor mem_d_invalidate_o after LSU invalidate request

name: full_pipeline_flow
desc: Exercise complete pipeline with valid memory responses

name: reset_during_operation
desc: Assert reset while pipeline is active, verify clean reset
